theme: Longer Vacations vs. Shorter Frequent Breaks

sentences.english: Would you prefer one long vacation per year or several shorter breaks throughout the year?
sentences.korean: 연 1회 긴 휴가와 여러 번의 짧은 휴식 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I prefer taking several shorter breaks throughout the year rather than one long vacation.
sentences.korean: 한 번의 긴 휴가보다 일 년 내내 여러 번의 짧은 휴식을 선호해요.

sentences.english: First frequent breaks prevent burnout by giving you something to look forward to every few weeks.
sentences.korean: 첫째 잦은 휴식은 몇 주마다 기대할 것을 줌으로써 번아웃을 방지해요.

sentences.english: With one long vacation you might spend eleven months waiting and by the end you dread returning to work.
sentences.korean: 한 번의 긴 휴가로는 11개월을 기다릴 수 있고 끝에는 복귀가 두려워요.

theme: Longer Vacations vs. Shorter Frequent Breaks

sentences.english: Second shorter trips are easier to plan and less expensive which means you can visit more places over the course of a year.
sentences.korean: 둘째 짧은 여행은 계획하기 쉽고 비용이 덜 들어 1년간 더 많은 곳을 방문할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: For me having regular mini-escapes keeps my energy and motivation consistently high throughout the year.
sentences.korean: 나에게 정기적인 소규모 탈출은 일 년 내내 에너지와 동기를 꾸준히 높게 유지해줘요.
